candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in preview, so acceptable as a revenue line and useful as a possible alternate label over time.
Not revenue; operating expense component.
Direct top-line sales label; same values as Total Revenue in preview, likely the underlying sales line.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not REVT.

variables.notes: Selected top-line revenue labels as a priority list. 'Net sales' is most semantically precise; 'Total Revenue' is a valid fallback if labeling changes across years.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales row is shown. 'Operating expenses' is too broad and includes overhead and D&A, so it should not be used for COGS.

candidates.why: Broad operating overhead bucket above D&A and operating result; populated. No explicit populated SG&A row is available, so this is the closest overhead bucket.
Could be an SG&A component, but preview is empty and likely part of Operating expenses.
Could be an SG&A component, but preview is empty and likely part of Operating expenses.
Classic SG&A component, but preview is empty and likely part of Operating expenses.
Possible SG&A component, but preview is empty and likely part of Operating expenses.
Potential SG&A-related component, but no values shown and may be included elsewhere.
Dedicated R&D row exists but appears separate from general overhead; include in XSGA only if not already embedded in selected bucket.
Potential personnel overhead label, but empty and likely supplemental/duplicate.
Explicit SG&A label exists, but appears unpopulated in preview. Rule says include explicit SG&A row and also a broad overhead bucket when explicit SG&A exists but is mostly empty.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Applied SG&A hierarchy rule (b): an explicit 'Selling, General & Admin' row exists but appears mostly empty in the preview, so included it together with the broader 'Operating expenses' bucket for coverage across years. Did not add 'Research & Development' to XSGA because R&D is likely already embedded in these broader overhead buckets; adding it could double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense, so not preferred for XRD.
Dedicated R&D line item on the income statement, located above operating profit.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.
Balance sheet-related amortization label, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated income-statement R&D expense row. It appears above operating profit, satisfying placement guidance.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line that includes interest and possibly other items; acceptable fallback if no cleaner interest label is available in a given year.

candidates.row_label: Effective interest expenses for financial liabilities recognized at amortized cost
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense component; good candidate.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component, but only lease-related and therefore narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct total interest expense label; preferable when available.
Generic explicit interest expense label, but preview is empty; still a good semantic fallback because presence implies some value in at least one year.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail, narrower than total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Effective interest expenses for financial liabilities recognized at amortized cost

variables.notes: Priority list favors the most direct interest-expense labels first, with broader finance cost as fallback. Excluded lease-interest-only rows from final_choice because they are partial components rather than the preferred single reported line.

candidates.row_label: To non-controlling interest Earnings per share calculated on the proft attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement/EPS text, not balance-sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: To equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not book equity.
Not shareholders' equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, as required.
Total equity line; acceptable fallback, but less preferred because owner-attributable line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests. Included 'Shareholders equity' as fallback in case labeling changes across years; in this preview it matches the owner-attributable amount.

candidates.row_label: To non-controlling interest Earnings per share calculated on the proft attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement/EPS text, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Could indicate minority interest attribution on income statement, but not a balance-sheet equity line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to noncontrolling interests
candidates.why: Income statement OCI attribution, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; correct concept for MIB.
Direct balance-sheet alternative label for MIB.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet non-controlling interest labels as a priority list. Values appear blank in the preview, which is acceptable; presence means the row exists for at least one year.
